name: Chocolate Red Beet Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix beets and eggs.
2. In a separate bowl, combine cocoa, vanilla, and oil. Mix well.
3. Add the sifted flour, sugar, salt, and baking soda to the beet mixture. Mix thoroughly in a larger bowl.
4. Divide the batter between two greased and floured 9x13 pans.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes.
6. Cool, then frost in the pans or cool for 10 minutes after removing from the pans.
7. Frosting: Combine all ingredients except milk in a large bowl. Beat until spreadable. Gradually add milk to achieve a spreading consistency.
